summary: Iteration 9 testing complete. All Gallery System features working correctly. 21/21 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed. Admin can upload match day photos via Gallery tab. Public Team Hub has 'Γκαλερί' tab with photo grid, category filters, and lightbox view.
critical_code_review_comments: GalleryItem model in server.py correctly defines all fields (id, title, image_url, category, description, match_id, player_id, tags, is_featured, created_at)
GET /api/gallery returns empty array initially and supports category/player_id/match_id/featured filters
POST /api/admin/gallery correctly requires authentication (returns 401 without auth)
POST /api/admin/gallery/upload handles file uploads and stores in /api/uploads/gallery/
PUT /api/admin/gallery/{id} and DELETE /api/admin/gallery/{id} work correctly with auth
Admin Panel has 13 tabs with Gallery (Γκαλερί) between Seasons and Messages
Admin Gallery tab has 'Νέα Φωτογραφία' button and category filter pills
Gallery form modal includes title, image URL, file upload, category dropdown, description, player_id, match_id, featured checkbox
Public Team Hub has 6 tabs with 'Γκαλερί' tab showing photo grid
Public Gallery has category filters: Όλα, Αγώνας, Προπόνηση, Εκδηλώσεις, Ακαδημία, Φίλαθλοι, Άλλο
Lightbox opens on photo click with title, description, category, and close button
Dashboard API returns gallery_photos count correctly
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test gallery item during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 verified Gallery System: 1) GET /api/gallery returns empty array initially, supports ?category=, ?player_id=, ?match_id=, ?featured= filters, 2) POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/gallery require auth (401 without), 3) POST /api/admin/gallery/upload handles file uploads to /api/uploads/gallery/, 4) Admin Panel has 13 tabs with Gallery (data-testid='admin-tab-gallery'), 5) Admin Gallery tab has 'Νέα Φωτογραφία' button (data-testid='add-gallery-btn') and category filters, 6) Gallery form has title/url/category/description/player_id/match_id/featured fields, 7) Public Team Hub has 6 tabs with 'Γκαλερί' (data-testid='team-tab-gallery'), 8) Public Gallery has category filter pills and photo grid, 9) Lightbox opens on photo click (data-testid='gallery-lightbox') with navigation, 10) Dashboard API returns gallery_photos count

GET /api/gallery.details: Returns empty array initially, supports category/player_id/match_id/featured filters

POST /api/admin/gallery with auth.details: Creates gallery item with all fields

gallery_form_modal.details: Form modal opens with title, URL, file upload, category, description, player_id, match_id, featured fields
